name: io.github.lpeluso-dotcom/servicetitan-mcp
description: Unofficial enterprise-grade MCP server for the ServiceTitan API — 76 read/write tools over Streamable HTTP, with OAuth, a dryRun→confirm write-gate, audit logging, and rate limiting.

headers.name: X-Sync-Key
headers.description: Inbound auth token matching the worker's MCP_SYNC_KEY secret
